testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should return text as it is when not so many chars aruond highlight
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should return text as it is when not so many chars aruond highlight

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text to ~200 chars around highlight (sample 1)
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text to ~200 chars around highlight (sample 1)

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text to ~200 chars around highlight (sample 2)
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text to ~200 chars around highlight (sample 2)

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text around highlight (sample 2) and add omission marks
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text around highlight (sample 2) and add omission marks

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text to ~50 chars around highlight
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text to ~50 chars around highlight

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should not truncate text which has no highlights
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should not truncate text which has no highlights

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should not truncate text with very long words
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should not truncate text with very long words

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should not truncate text which has only highlights
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should not truncate text which has only highlights

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text w/ almost no spaces
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should truncate text w/ almost no spaces

testcase.classname: #trimTextAroundTag should aggressively trim text when maxTotalLength is small
testcase.name: #trimTextAroundTag should aggressively trim text when maxTotalLength is small
